news.title:
Yes Bank to review Q4 results on April 18, indicating upcoming earnings update.
Potential guidance updates for investors may also be expected during the review.
news.summary:
Yes Bank to review Q4 results on April 18, indicating upcoming earnings update.
Potential guidance updates for investors may also be expected during the review.

news.title:
Yes Bank schedules analyst/investor meet from June 1-2, 2026, in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared; updates via Yes Bank's website.
news.summary:
Yes Bank schedules analyst/investor meet from June 1-2, 2026, in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared; updates via Yes Bank's website.

news.title:
Analysts recommend 'Buy' for Samvardhana Motherson, Mahindra & Mahindra, and UNO Minda, citing strong growth potential.
Hero MotoCorp advised as 'Buy on Dips', 'Hold' for IRFC, while Yes Bank flagged as 'Avoid' by experts.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend 'Buy' for Samvardhana Motherson, Mahindra & Mahindra, and UNO Minda, citing strong growth potential.
Hero MotoCorp advised as 'Buy on Dips', 'Hold' for IRFC, while Yes Bank flagged as 'Avoid' by experts.

news.title:
Banks face funding pressures, shifting FY26 growth from margins to volume-driven amid reliance on wholesale sources.
RBI data shows advances grew 13.8% as of March 15, outpacing deposit growth of 10.8%, widening loan-liability gap.
news.summary:
Banks face funding pressures, shifting FY26 growth from margins to volume-driven amid reliance on wholesale sources.
RBI data shows advances grew 13.8% as of March 15, outpacing deposit growth of 10.8%, widening loan-liability gap.

news.title:
Vinay M Tonse outlines a four-pillar growth strategy for YES Bank as new CEO.
Focus areas include profitability, digital capabilities, governance, and risk discipline.
news.summary:
Vinay M Tonse outlines a four-pillar growth strategy for YES Bank as new CEO.
Focus areas include profitability, digital capabilities, governance, and risk discipline.

news.title:
Prashant Kumar steps down as MD & CEO of Yes Bank after tenure completion.
Vinay Muralidhar Tonse takes over as Yes Bank's MD & CEO effective today.
news.summary:
Prashant Kumar steps down as MD & CEO of Yes Bank after tenure completion.
Vinay Muralidhar Tonse takes over as Yes Bank's MD & CEO effective today.

news.title:
Sensex, Nifty 50 likely to open lower amidst mixed global cues, oil price surge.
HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, and others in focus after Q4 updates.
news.summary:
Sensex, Nifty 50 likely to open lower amidst mixed global cues, oil price surge.
HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, and others in focus after Q4 updates.

news.title: Yes Bank appoints Vinay Muralidhar Tonse as MD and CEO.
news.summary: Yes Bank appoints Vinay Muralidhar Tonse as MD and CEO.

news.title:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.
news.summary:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.

news.title:
Yes Bank's Q4FY26 saw loans grow 10.7% YoY to Rs 2.72 lakh cr, deposits up 12.1% YoY to Rs 3.18 lakh cr.
CASA deposits rose 14.9% YoY to Rs 1.11 lakh cr; CASA ratio improved to 35.1%, indicating lower funding costs.
news.summary:
Yes Bank's Q4FY26 saw loans grow 10.7% YoY to Rs 2.72 lakh cr, deposits up 12.1% YoY to Rs 3.18 lakh cr.
CASA deposits rose 14.9% YoY to Rs 1.11 lakh cr; CASA ratio improved to 35.1%, indicating lower funding costs.

news.title: YES Bank's Q4 update shows loans up 11% YoY and deposits up 12%.
news.summary: YES Bank's Q4 update shows loans up 11% YoY and deposits up 12%.

news.title:
Nifty Bank dropped 16% in 5 weeks, with 8 stocks entering bear territory. IDFC First Bank fell 31%, YES Bank 26.5%.
State-owned banks saw heavy selling; Nifty PSU Bank index fell 20%. Rising yields and inflation fears hurt sentiment.
news.summary:
Nifty Bank dropped 16% in 5 weeks, with 8 stocks entering bear territory. IDFC First Bank fell 31%, YES Bank 26.5%.
State-owned banks saw heavy selling; Nifty PSU Bank index fell 20%. Rising yields and inflation fears hurt sentiment.

news.title:
India's 10-year bond yield rose to 7.07%, its highest since May 2024, driven by surging crude prices.
Yes Bank expects yields to range 6.75%-7.25% in H1FY27 amid fiscal pressures, rupee weakness, and inflation risks.
news.summary:
India's 10-year bond yield rose to 7.07%, its highest since May 2024, driven by surging crude prices.
Yes Bank expects yields to range 6.75%-7.25% in H1FY27 amid fiscal pressures, rupee weakness, and inflation risks.

news.title:
Yes Bank report warns rupee may weaken to 97/USD in H1FY27 if West Asia crisis persists.
Report highlights rising oil prices, inflation, and weakened BoP; RBI may need flexible measures.
news.summary:
Yes Bank report warns rupee may weaken to 97/USD in H1FY27 if West Asia crisis persists.
Report highlights rising oil prices, inflation, and weakened BoP; RBI may need flexible measures.

news.title:
Yes Bank appoints S. Anantharaman as Chief Risk Officer.
He brings risk leadership experience from Jio Financial, BoB, HDFC Bank, and L&T Finance.
news.summary:
Yes Bank appoints S. Anantharaman as Chief Risk Officer.
He brings risk leadership experience from Jio Financial, BoB, HDFC Bank, and L&T Finance.

news.title:
Yes Bank saw a volume surge on 1 April 2026 with 2.36 cr shares traded.
Despite a 3.1% gain, the stock underperformed its sector and key moving averages.
news.summary:
Yes Bank saw a volume surge on 1 April 2026 with 2.36 cr shares traded.
Despite a 3.1% gain, the stock underperformed its sector and key moving averages.

news.title:
Yes Bank received INR 210 crores from two trusts in the Security Receipts Portfolio.
The funds came from JC Flower ARC and were disclosed under SEBI's Regulation 30.
news.summary:
Yes Bank received INR 210 crores from two trusts in the Security Receipts Portfolio.
The funds came from JC Flower ARC and were disclosed under SEBI's Regulation 30.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.

news.title:
Yes Bank saw high trading volume on 25 Mar 2026, with 1.79 cr shares traded.
The stock gained 2.1%, showing mixed accumulation and distribution signals.
news.summary:

Despite high activity, Yes Bank fell 0.1%, reflecting mixed investor sentiment.
